What we do

Complete pest control, start to finish

From the first inspection to the final all‑clear, Bye Bye Bed Bugs handles every step for homes and businesses.

Inspection

A thorough, trained inspection to confirm the pest and pinpoint where they're hiding before any treatment begins.

Heat & Steam Treatment

High‑heat and steam methods that kill bed bugs and eggs at every life stage — chemical‑light and highly effective.

Licensed Pesticide

Targeted, government‑approved products applied by licensed technicians — safe, measured, and effective.

Rodent Control

Trapping, removal, and sealing entry points so mice and rats stay out for good.

Prevention & Protection

Encasements, monitoring, and exclusion work so the pests don't come back after we leave.

Commercial & Multi‑Unit

Restaurants, offices, rental units and apartment buildings — discreet treatment that works around your schedule.

Your one‑stop pest shop

One call does the whole job

Treatment only works if the space is properly prepped. Most exterminators leave that to you — Bye Bye Bed Bugs doesn't. With our own trucks and heat equipment, we handle the heavy lifting from start to finish — and can even move you to a new place bed‑bug‑free.

Our trucks, our crew

Junk & garbage removal

Got a unit packed with infested furniture and clutter? We bring our own garbage truck and roll‑off hook bin, double‑bag and seal everything on site, and carry it out carefully — never dragging it through hallways or shared spaces — so nothing spreads on the way out.

  • Everything double‑bagged & sealed on site
  • Never dragged through hallways or shared areas
  • Old mattresses & furniture hauled away
  • Roll‑off / hook bin available
  • Same‑day hauling across the GTA
Call for a haul‑away quote

Decluttering

We clear out the clutter bed bugs hide in, room by room, so nothing gets missed.

Treatment prep

Full prep before we spray — moving, bagging, and protecting your belongings the right way.

Laundry & clothes washing

We launder and heat‑treat your clothing and linens to kill bed bugs hiding in the fabric.

Cleaning services

Deep cleaning after treatment so your home is fresh, sanitized, and livable again.

Bed‑bug‑safe moving

Moving homes? We heat‑treat your belongings before they reach the new place — and on the way back — so you never carry bed bugs with you.

Heat chamber

A sealed, heated room where furniture, couches, mattresses, and belongings are treated — killing bed bugs without chemicals and without throwing your things out.

Our equipment

Professional heat treatment gear

Bed bugs can't survive sustained high heat. We bring trailer-mounted heaters, high-output fans, and heat exchangers that raise your space to lethal temperatures and reach every crack, seam, and hiding spot — powerful, thorough, and chemical-free.

Ask about heat treatment
How it works

The 4 B's to a pest‑free home

Book · Bust · Banish · Backed. No guesswork, no surprise charges — you know exactly what happens and when.

View the prep checklist

Book

Book your free inspection. We come to you, confirm the pest, and find every hot spot.

Bust

We bust the infestation with the right mix of heat, steam, traps, and licensed products.

Banish

We haul away, launder, and clean — then seal things up so the pests are gone for good.

Backed

Every job is backed by a follow‑up visit to make sure the pests are truly gone.

Why choose us

Why use Bye Bye Bed Bugs?

Bye Bye Bed Bugs Inc. is a locally owned pest control company based at 4129 Lawrence Ave. E in Scarborough, serving homes and businesses across the Greater Toronto Area. We started with one mission — get rid of bed bugs for good — and grew into a full‑service team that handles every common pest, with the same fast, discreet, no‑nonsense service.

  • Licensed & insured technicians

    Trained, certified, and fully insured — every treatment done by the book.

  • Fast, same‑day response

    Pests spread quickly. We move quickly — most calls get same‑ or next‑day service.

  • Discreet & respectful

    Unmarked vehicles and tidy work — your neighbours never need to know.

  • Follow‑up included

    We don't disappear after one visit — we come back to make sure it worked.

Good to know

Your pest questions, answered

How do I know what kind of pest I have?
Often the signs overlap — bites, droppings, damage, or sightings. The surest way is a proper inspection, which we'll do before recommending any treatment.
How fast can you come out?
In most cases we offer same‑day or next‑day service across the GTA. Call the office at 416‑590‑1993 and we'll find the soonest slot.
Is the treatment safe for my family and pets?
Yes. We lean on heat and steam wherever possible and apply only licensed, government‑approved products in measured amounts. Our technician will walk you through any short prep or wait times.
Do you treat businesses too?
Absolutely — restaurants, offices, rental units, and multi‑unit buildings. We work discreetly and around your schedule.
What will it cost?
It depends on the pest, the size of the space, and the level of infestation, which is why we inspect first and give you a clear, upfront price — no surprises.
